Karen Whitfield

Chief Operating Officer

Commanding presence but approachable Values safety above everything Pragmatic decision-maker Relationship-focused Leads by example

Areas of Expertise

  • Pilbara mining operations
  • FIFO workforce management
  • Mine planning and scheduling
  • WA mining regulations
  • Business strategy and operational execution
  • Autonomous mining technology implementation
  • Traditional Owner relationships
  • Cross-commodity mining operations

For Other Topics

  • Environment: speak with Dr. Ravi Mehta
  • Safety: speak with Brooke Lawson
  • Finance: speak with Tom Gallagher
  • Hr: speak with Danielle Keenan

Schedule an Interview

You need to book an appointment before speaking with Karen Whitfield.
